name: Rejection After Interview
response_html:
Dear {{ candidate_name }},

Thank you for taking the time to interview for the role of {{ role_title }} at {{ company_name }}.

After careful consideration, we will not be progressing with your application at this time. This decision was difficult given the high quality of candidates.

We appreciate your interest in {{ company_name }} and encourage you to apply for future opportunities.

Kind regards,

{{ signature_name }}

Human Resources

{{ company_name }}
subject: Application Outcome - {{role_title}} at {{company_name}}

name: Employee Welcome Email
response_html:
Dear {{ doc.employee_name }},

We are excited to welcome you to {{ doc.company }}.

{{ custom_message }}

We look forward towards working with you.

Kind regards,
HR Team
subject: Welcome to {{ doc.company }}

name: Company-Wide Onboarding Invite
response_html:
Dear Team,

We are excited to announce that {{ employee.employee_name }} is joining {{ company_name }} today as {{ employee.designation or 'our new team member' }} in the {{ employee.department or '' }} department.

About {{ employee.employee_name.split()[0] }}:
{{ employee.employee_name }} brings valuable experience and skills to our team. Please join us in welcoming {{ employee.employee_name }} warmly and helping {{ employee.employee_name }} settle in.

You can reach {{ employee.employee_name.split()[0] }} at: {{ employee.company_email or 'TBD' }}

Let's make {{ employee.employee_name.split()[0] }}'s first day memorable!

Best regards,
HR Team
{{ company_name }}
subject: Welcome Our New Team Member – {{ employee.employee_name }}

name: Request for Quotation Template
response:
Dear {{ doc.supplier_name }},


We are pleased to invite you to submit a quotation for the following items:



Please submit your quotation by {{ doc.due_date }}.


Thank you!


Best regards,

{{ doc.company }}
response_html:
Dear {{ supplier_name }}

IntelliSOFT Consulting Limited hereby solicits a quotation for the following item(s):
This Request for Quotation is open to all legally-constituted companies & individuals that can provide the requested services.

GENERAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS

IntelliSOFT Consulting Limited is a wholly owned Kenyan company with +15 years of experience. We have and continue to deliberately focus on designing, developing, implementing, supporting and maintaining digital health solutions, particularly for Low to Medium Income Countries.
We work with our clients to support the realization and optimization of their business performance and productivity through development, implementation and supporting meaningful use of information, communications and technology-agnostic, web-optimized software, particularly for low-resourced environments. Our primary focus is health systems’ strengthening specifically in the area of Health Research Support Information Systems and Health Management Information Systems.

Questions

Questions or requests for further clarifications should be submitted in writing to the contact person below:

RFQ NO: {{ name }}
Email Address: accounts@intellisoftkenya.com

The deadline for submission is {{ schedule_date }} EAT.
Questions will be answered in writing and shared via email with all parties as soon as possible after this deadline.

  1. Content for Submission

    Quotations should be submitted in a single file where possible, depending on file size. The vendor must fill in and submit the Vendor RFQ submission form (See Appendix Section A) that comprises following sections: Vendor Information Form Submission of Quotation Form

  2. Instructions for submission

    The Vendor RFQ submission Form & Submission of Quotation Form (See Appendix Section A) should be uploaded as instructed in this submission Form. Based on the guidelines set forth in Section III above, quotations have to be sent by completing this submission Form no later than Friday, 23rd, August 2024 by 2:00 PM EAT.

  3. Overview of Evaluation Process

    Quotations will be evaluated based on compliance with the technical specifications and the total cost of the goods (price quote).

  4. AWard

    IntelliSOFT shall award a Purchase Order to the lowest-priced bidder whose quotation has been determined to be substantially compliant with the documents requested. If your offer is selected we may ask you to submit additional documents to be sent to our QA Team for approval like: product links/sites of your work.

  5. Right to Vary Requirements

    IntelliSOFT reserves the right at the time of award of Contract to increase or decrease the quantity/number of items specified in this RFQ without any change in unit prices or other terms and conditions.

  6. Payment Terms

    IntelliSOFT’s default payment terms are payment upon delivery of goods and receipt of a tax invoice describing the goods delivered.

  7. Fraud and Corruption

    IntelliSOFT is committed to preventing, identifying, and addressing all acts of fraud against IntelliSOFT, as well as against third parties involved in IntelliSOFT’s activities.

  8. Zero Tolerance

    IntelliSOFT has adopted a zero-tolerance policy on gifts and hospitality. Suppliers are therefore requested not to send gifts or offer hospitality to IntelliSOFT personnel.

  9. Warranty

    Warranty shall be quoted based on the standard warranties provided by the manufacturer unless specified differently in this General Instruction. A Warranty Certificate shall be provided by the Supplier.

{% if name is defined %} {% endif %}

If the button above doesn't work, you can submit your quotation by:

  1. RFQ: {{ name if name is defined else doc.name if doc and doc.name }}
  2. Email your quotation to: accounts@intellisoftkenya.com
subject: Request for Quotation

Request you to take out a few minutes to fill up this Exit Questionnaire. {% set web_form = frappe.db.get_value('HR Settings', 'HR Settings', 'exit_questionnaire_web_form') %} {% set web_form_link = frappe.utils.get_url(uri=frappe.db.get_value('Web Form', web_form, 'route')) %}

name: Farewell Email Template
response_html:
Dear Team,

This is to inform you that {{employee_name}} ({{job_title}}) will be leaving {{company_name}}, with their last working day being {{last_day_date}}.

We appreciate {{employee_name}}'s contribution and commitment during their time with us and wish them success in their next chapter.

Please join us in wishing {{employee_name}} all the very best.


Kind regards,

{{signature_name}}

Human Resources
subject: Farewell to {{employee_name}}

name: Quarterly Annual Leave accrual notifications
response_html:
Hi {{ doc.employee_name }},

This is your quarterly annual leave balance update.

As at {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(frappe.utils.nowdate()) }}, your Annual Leave balance is {{ doc.leave_balance }} days.

Please plan to take your leave to rest and recharge, and to help prevent burnout.

If you would like support planning your leave dates, kindly speak with your supervisor or reach out to HR.


Kind regards,
HR Department
subject: Quarterly Annual Leave accrual notifications
